description: Sparse white-space, wobbly hand-drawn, strange-but-clean low-tech object sketches with deadpan character action.

visual_dna.background: pure white background with lots of empty space
visual_dna.line_art: sparse, slightly wobbly black hand-drawn line art
visual_dna.metaphor_logic: low-tech physical metaphors such as levers, carts, gears, funnels, workbenches, meters, scraps, parcels, and small machines
visual_dna.composition: main subject occupies about 40%-60% of the canvas with at least 35% blank white space
visual_dna.character_treatment: the character does the strange conceptual work with a deadpan serious expression
visual_dna.accent_colors: orange for paths/arrows, red for warnings or friction, blue for secondary state, green/yellow only for object separation

style_block: Pure white background with sparse, slightly wobbly black hand-drawn line art.
Use a clean low-tech physical metaphor: switches, levers, carts, gears, funnels, workbenches, meters, labels, scraps, parcels, or small machines.
The character must do the strange conceptual work inside the mechanism, with a deadpan serious expression; never place the character as a cute mascot or idle observer.
Make the scene clear but not instructional, interesting but not childish, strange but clean.
Avoid formal diagram language: no PPT slide composition, no corporate vector infographic, no realistic UI, no dense chart, no title block.
Composition target: the main subject should occupy about 40%-60% of the canvas; preserve at least 35% blank white space.
Use light accent colors sparingly: orange for paths/arrows, red for warnings or friction, blue for secondary state, green/yellow only when a physical object needs separation.
prompt_rules.placeholder_policy: All label areas must remain blank visual plaques, signs, callouts, or notes for deterministic overlay.
